mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.id) p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.descirption, p.fengdu, p.gaishu, p.danwei, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.is_jiehuo, p.is_changyong, p.usage_count, s.color, s.size, s.tightness, s.temperature_range, s.performance, g.flat_hot_stamping, g.embossed_gold_stamping, g.refractive_holographic_patterned_textured_hot_stamping, g.post_hot_stamping_embossing_debossing, pr.price, l.company_number, l.gp_no FROM products p LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN gold_foil_type g ON p.id = g.project_id LEFT JOIN pricing pr ON p.id = pr.project_id LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers l ON p.id = l.project_id WHERE (p.status IS NULL OR p.status = '可用') ORDER BY p.id, s.id NULLS LAST, l.id NULLS LAST, pr.id NULLS LAST, g.id NULLS LAST

choose.when:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.descirption, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.fengdu, p.gaishu, p.danwei, p.is_jiehuo, p.is_changyong, p.paizi, p.usage_count, s.color, s.color_num, s.size, s.tightness, s.temperature_range, s.performance, pr.price, l.company_number, l.gp_no FROM products p INNER JOIN pre_processing_steps pps ON ( pps.series_name = p.name AND ( (pps.product_id IS NOT NULL AND pps.product_id = p.id) OR (pps.product_id IS NULL) ) ) AND pps.is_active = true AND pps.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type AND pps.step_id = #{params.preProcessingStepsOptionId} AND pps.status = 'V' AND (p.status IS NULL OR p.status = '可用') LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN pricing pr ON p.id = pr.project_id LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers l ON p.id = l.project_id
LEFT JOIN lamination_compatibility lc ON (
)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_print ppp ON ( (ppp.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND ppp.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (ppp.product_name IS NOT NULL AND ppp.product_name = p.name) ) AND (ppp.color IS NULL OR ppp.color = '' OR ppp.color = s.color) AND (ppp.paper_type IS NULL OR ppp.paper_type = '' OR ppp.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_leduvglitter ppl ON ( (ppl.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND ppl.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (ppl.product_name IS NOT NULL AND ppl.product_name = p.name) ) AND (ppl.paper_type IS NULL OR ppl.paper_type = '' OR ppl.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_print_uv pppu ON ( (pppu.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND pppu.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (pppu.product_name IS NOT NULL AND pppu.product_name = p.name) ) AND ( -- company_number 或 gp_no 任一与 UV 配置中的公司编号/客户GP号匹配即可 (l.company_number IS NULL OR l.company_number = '' OR pppu.company_number = l.company_number) OR (l.gp_no IS NULL OR l.gp_no = '' OR pppu.company_number = l.gp_no) ) AND (pppu.paper_type IS NULL OR pppu.paper_type = '' OR pppu.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
choose.otherwise:
FROM products p
INNER JOIN lamination_compatibility lc ON (
)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_print ppp ON ( (ppp.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND ppp.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (ppp.product_name IS NOT NULL AND ppp.product_name = p.name) ) AND (ppp.color IS NULL OR ppp.color = '' OR ppp.color = s.color) AND (ppp.paper_type IS NULL OR ppp.paper_type = '' OR ppp.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_leduvglitter ppl ON ( (ppl.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND ppl.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (ppl.product_name IS NOT NULL AND ppl.product_name = p.name) ) AND (ppl.paper_type IS NULL OR ppl.paper_type = '' OR ppl.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_print_uv pppu ON ( (pppu.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND pppu.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (pppu.product_name IS NOT NULL AND pppu.product_name = p.name) ) AND ( (l.company_number IS NULL OR l.company_number = '' OR pppu.company_number = l.company_number) OR (l.gp_no IS NULL OR l.gp_no = '' OR pppu.company_number = l.gp_no) ) AND (pppu.paper_type IS NULL OR pppu.paper_type = '' OR pppu.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)

choose.when:
ORDER BY pr.price
DESC NULLS LAST
ASC NULLS LAST
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY pr.price ASC NULLS LAST

mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT l.company_number FROM leo_gp_numbers l JOIN products p ON p.id = l.project_id WHERE l.company_number IS NOT NULL AND l.company_number != '' AND (p.status IS NULL OR p.status = '可用') ORDER BY l.company_number
SELECT DISTINCT l.gp_no FROM leo_gp_numbers l JOIN products p ON p.id = l.project_id WHERE l.gp_no IS NOT NULL AND l.gp_no != '' AND (p.status IS NULL OR p.status = '可用') ORDER BY l.gp_no

choose.when:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM products p INNER JOIN pre_processing_steps pps ON ( pps.series_name = p.name AND pps.is_active = true AND pps.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type AND pps.step_id = #{params.preProcessingStepsOptionId} AND pps.status = 'V' AND (pps.product_id IS NULL OR pps.product_id = p.id) AND (p.status IS NULL OR p.status = '可用') ) LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN pricing pr ON p.id = pr.project_id LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers l ON p.id = l.project_id
LEFT JOIN lamination_compatibility lc ON (
)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_print ppp ON ( (ppp.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND ppp.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (ppp.product_name IS NOT NULL AND ppp.product_name = p.name) ) AND (ppp.color IS NULL OR ppp.color = '' OR ppp.color = s.color) AND (ppp.paper_type IS NULL OR ppp.paper_type = '' OR ppp.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_leduvglitter ppl ON ( (ppl.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND ppl.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (ppl.product_name IS NOT NULL AND ppl.product_name = p.name) ) AND (ppl.paper_type IS NULL OR ppl.paper_type = '' OR ppl.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_print_uv pppu ON ( (pppu.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND pppu.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (pppu.product_name IS NOT NULL AND pppu.product_name = p.name) ) AND ( (l.company_number IS NULL OR l.company_number = '' OR pppu.company_number = l.company_number) OR (l.gp_no IS NULL OR l.gp_no = '' OR pppu.company_number = l.gp_no) ) AND (pppu.paper_type IS NULL OR pppu.paper_type = '' OR pppu.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
choose.otherwise:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM products p
INNER JOIN lamination_compatibility lc ON (
)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_print ppp ON ( (ppp.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND ppp.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (ppp.product_name IS NOT NULL AND ppp.product_name = p.name) ) AND (ppp.color IS NULL OR ppp.color = '' OR ppp.color = s.color) AND (ppp.paper_type IS NULL OR ppp.paper_type = '' OR ppp.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_leduvglitter ppl ON ( (ppl.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND ppl.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (ppl.product_name IS NOT NULL AND ppl.product_name = p.name) ) AND (ppl.paper_type IS NULL OR ppl.paper_type = '' OR ppl.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)
LEFT JOIN post_processing_print_uv pppu ON ( (pppu.product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND pppu.product_model_number = p.model_number) OR (pppu.product_name IS NOT NULL AND pppu.product_name = p.name) ) AND ( (l.company_number IS NULL OR l.company_number = '' OR pppu.company_number = l.company_number) OR (l.gp_no IS NULL OR l.gp_no = '' OR pppu.company_number = l.gp_no) ) AND (pppu.paper_type IS NULL OR pppu.paper_type = '' OR pppu.paper_type = p.hot_stamping_paper_type)

mapper.sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.name, p.model_number, p.material_number, p.descirption, p.fengdu, p.gaishu, p.hot_stamping_paper_type, p.danwei, p.is_jiehuo, p.is_changyong, p.paizi, p.usage_count, s.color, s.color_num, s.size, s.tightness, s.temperature_range, s.performance, pr.price, l.company_number, l.gp_no
LEFT JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id LEFT JOIN pricing pr ON p.id = pr.project_id LEFT JOIN leo_gp_numbers l ON p.id = l.project_id
mapper.update:
UPDATE products SET usage_count = usage_count + 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
